All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

S

SELECT_DIRECTORIES_ONLY_AS_LEAF - Enum constant in enum class timgutilities.textio.DirectorySelectionMode
No navigation to other directories is allowed, only directories within the specified directory are listed for selection
SELECT_DIRECTORY_AS_NAVIGATION_OR_FILE_AS_LEAF - Enum constant in enum class timgutilities.textio.DirectorySelectionMode
Navigation to other directories is allowed, only files within the active directory are available for selection
SELECT_DIRECTORY_AS_NAVIGATION_OR_LEAF - Enum constant in enum class timgutilities.textio.DirectorySelectionMode
Navigation to other directories is allowed, only directories within the active directory are available for selection
SELECT_DIRECTORY_AS_NAVIGATION_OR_LEAF_SELECT_FILE_AS_LEAF - Enum constant in enum class timgutilities.textio.DirectorySelectionMode
Navigation to other directories is allowed, both directories and files within the active directory are available for selection
SELECT_DIRECTORY_OR_FILE_AS_LEAF - Enum constant in enum class timgutilities.textio.DirectorySelectionMode
No navigation to other directories is allowed, both directories and files within the specified directory are listed for selection
SELECT_FILES_ONLY_AS_LEAF - Enum constant in enum class timgutilities.textio.DirectorySelectionMode
No navigation to other directories is allowed, only files within the specified directory are listed for selection
selectAndRunLoop(String, RunnableCommand[], boolean) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
display the prompt, then a list of command names strings from the entries in the RunnableCommands, if insertQuit is present then a quit option is added as the first option.
selectAndRunLoop(String, RunnableCommand[], boolean, boolean) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
display the prompt, then a list of command names strings from the entries in the RunnableCommands, if insertQuit is present then a quit option is added as the first option.
selectAndRunLoop(String, RunnableCommand[], boolean, boolean, boolean) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
display the prompt, then a list of command names strings from the entries in the RunnableCommands, if insertQuit is present then if quitFirst is present a quit option is added as the first option, if quitFirst is false then the quit option will be the last option.
SELECTION - Enum constant in enum class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE
the same a RANGE, but no restriction text is displayed
setCaseInsensitiveSort(boolean) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.DirectoryEntry
when comparing to another DirectoryEntry instance is the comparisson case sensitive or not.
setCurrentDirectoryName(String) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
setter for currentDirectoryName Be very careful using this to ensure you don;t use a valid entry name
setDefaultByChoiceDescription(ChoiceDescription<P>) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
sets the default choice using the provided choice description, and return the identified item.
setDefaultByIndex(Integer) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
Sets the choice description at the specified index to be the default
setDefaultByOption(String) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
sets the default choice using the provided option using the string equals, and return the identified item.
setDefaultByParam(P) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
sets the default choice using the provided param using it's equals method, and return the identified item.
setDefaultPauseString(String) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Lets you set the default string to be displayed when pausing
setDoSort(boolean) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
If set to true then before the choices are presented the choices will be sorted by the option text
setParentDirectoryName(String) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
setter for parentDirectoryName Be very careful using this to ensure you dont use a valid entry name
setSeparateFields(boolean) - Method in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescriptionData
If true then when the text is displayed it will be splie between open, description and additional using "," If false they will just be concatenated
